title: Excalibur - Biomes O' Plenty
description: Biomes O' Plenty in a Excalibur style
body:
[Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) in [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) style
